Column-1 has width and flex-order setting on base and mobile.

columns: Style for text inline blocks.

Paragraph 2

This is a test link element. It include strong , italic , span , CMD + K key, const $akbar inline code and highlight elements.

Column: style for text inline blocks.

Column-1

Column-2 – custom style – first on mobile

This is a test link element. It include strong , italic , span , CMD + K key, const $akbar inline code and highlight elements.

Column-3

Group → columns (inner block): red bg but columns block have blue bg color

column-2 customized width and bg color
